{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Product Quality Controller",
  "description": "Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a&nbsp;leading integrated facilities management and engineering services company in Nigeria, delivering world-class solutions across oil &amp; gas, and industrial sectors.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Quality Controller

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Product Quality Controller is responsible for ensuring that all products, materials, and services delivered meet defined quality standards, client specifications, and regulatory requirements.
	The role involves systematic inspection, testing, documentation, and reporting throughout the product lifecycle - from procurement and production through to final delivery.
	The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, analytical, and committed to continuous quality improvement.


Key Responsibilities
Quality Inspection &amp; Control:


	Conduct thorough inspections of incoming materials, in-process products, and finished goods against approved specifications and standards.
	Perform physical, dimensional, and functional testing of products using appropriate tools and instruments.
	Identify, document, and escalate non-conforming products; initiate and track corrective and preventive actions (CAPA).
	Monitor and verify that production processes comply with established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and quality control plans.


Documentation &amp; Reporting:


	Maintain accurate quality records including inspection reports, test results, non-conformance reports (NCRs), and quality logs.
	Prepare periodic quality performance reports with trend analysis and recommendations for management review.
	Ensure all documentation is in line with ISO standards and internal quality management system (QMS) requirements.


Standards &amp; Compliance:


	Ensure adherence to relevant industry standards (e.g., ISO 9001, SON, NAFDAC, client-specific standards) across all quality activities.
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and process walk-throughs.
	Stay current with updates to quality regulations, codes, and best practices.


Continuous Improvement:


	Participate in root cause analysis (RCA) investigations for quality failures and contribute to the development of effective corrective measures.


Qualifications &amp; Experience
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Engineering (Mechanical, Chemical, Electrical), Sciences, or a closely related field.


Experience:


	3&ndash;5 years of experience in a quality control or quality assurance role, preferably within engineering, manufacturing, oil &amp; gas, or facilities management.
	Demonstrated experience conducting quality inspections, managing NCRs, and implementing corrective actions.


Certifications (Preferred):


	ISO 9001: 2015 Lead Auditor or Internal Auditor certification.
	Certified Quality Inspector (CQI) or equivalent professional quality certification.

  "datePosted": "2026-04-08",

Product Quality Controller Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a leading integrated facilities management and engineering services company in Nigeria, delivering world-class solutions across oil & gas, and industrial sectors.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Quality Controller

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Product Quality Controller is responsible for ensuring that all products, materials, and services delivered meet defined quality standards, client specifications, and regulatory requirements.
	The role involves systematic inspection, testing, documentation, and reporting throughout the product lifecycle - from procurement and production through to final delivery.
	The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, analytical, and committed to continuous quality improvement.


Key Responsibilities
Quality Inspection & Control:


	Conduct thorough inspections of incoming materials, in-process products, and finished goods against approved specifications and standards.
	Perform physical, dimensional, and functional testing of products using appropriate tools and instruments.
	Identify, document, and escalate non-conforming products; initiate and track corrective and preventive actions (CAPA).
	Monitor and verify that production processes comply with established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and quality control plans.


Documentation & Reporting:


	Maintain accurate quality records including inspection reports, test results, non-conformance reports (NCRs), and quality logs.
	Prepare periodic quality performance reports with trend analysis and recommendations for management review.
	Ensure all documentation is in line with ISO standards and internal quality management system (QMS) requirements.


Standards & Compliance:


	Ensure adherence to relevant industry standards (e.g., ISO 9001, SON, NAFDAC, client-specific standards) across all quality activities.
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and process walk-throughs.
	Stay current with updates to quality regulations, codes, and best practices.


Continuous Improvement:


	Participate in root cause analysis (RCA) investigations for quality failures and contribute to the development of effective corrective measures.


Qualifications & Experience
Education:


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Engineering (Mechanical, Chemical, Electrical), Sciences, or a closely related field.


Experience:


	3–5 years of experience in a quality control or quality assurance role, preferably within engineering, manufacturing, oil & gas, or facilities management.
	Demonstrated experience conducting quality inspections, managing NCRs, and implementing corrective actions.


Certifications (Preferred):


	ISO 9001: 2015 Lead Auditor or Internal Auditor certification.
	Certified Quality Inspector (CQI) or equivalent professional quality certification.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketer Job at Sevic Recruit




        
    

        
        Sevic Recruit is a leading recruitment agency dedicated to connecting top talent with exceptional career opportunities with a proven track record of delivering exceptional talent solutions.Our mission is to foster lasting partnerships fostering a culture of trust, integrity, and mutual success.

We are expanding our team and recruiting experienced professionals to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Gwarinpa, Abuja (FCT)

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive brand visibility and lead generation. Must have strong communication skills, experience in digital/field marketing, and a track record of meeting targets.


Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Stretch-it Concepts Limited is&nbsp;a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: IT

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for clients, visitors, and employees, ensuring a professional and welcoming environment.
	The role involves managing front office operations, handling inquiries, coordinating communication, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day operations within the IT company.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to visitors, clients, and staff in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence, and direct them appropriately
	Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable reception area
	Schedule appointments, meetings, and conference room bookings
	Receive, sort, and distribute mail, deliveries, and packages
	Maintain visitor logs and ensure compliance with security protocols
	Provide basic information about the company&rsquo;s services and direct inquiries to relevant departments (e.g., technical support, sales)
	Assist with administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, and document management
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure seamless communication and operations
	Monitor office supplies and request replenishment when necessary
	Support administrative functions when required


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or OND / HND in Business Administration, Office Management, or related field
	Proven experience as a Front Desk Officer, Receptionist, or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Familiarity with office equipment (printers, scanners, etc.)


Key Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Strong interpersonal and customer service skills
	Professional appearance and attitude
	Good organizational abilities
	Attention to detail and problem-solving skills
	Time management and reliability.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@stretchitconcepts.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;FRONT DESK OFFICER&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Stretch-it Concepts Limited




        
    

        
        Stretch-it Concepts Limited is a human resource outsourcing solutions company, bureau of recruitment, performance management and training and development company situated in Lagos, Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: IT

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for clients, visitors, and employees, ensuring a professional and welcoming environment.
	The role involves managing front office operations, handling inquiries, coordinating communication, and providing administrative support to ensure smooth day-to-day operations within the IT company.


Key Responsibilities


	Greet and attend to visitors, clients, and staff in a courteous and professional manner
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence, and direct them appropriately
	Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable reception area
	Schedule appointments, meetings, and conference room bookings
	Receive, sort, and distribute mail, deliveries, and packages
	Maintain visitor logs and ensure compliance with security protocols
	Provide basic information about the company’s services and direct inquiries to relevant departments (e.g., technical support, sales)
	Assist with administrative tasks such as data entry, filing, and document management
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure seamless communication and operations
	Monitor office supplies and request replenishment when necessary
	Support administrative functions when required


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or OND / HND in Business Administration, Office Management, or related field
	Proven experience as a Front Desk Officer, Receptionist, or similar role
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Familiarity with office equipment (printers, scanners, etc.)


Key Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent verbal and written communication skills
	Strong interpersonal and customer service skills
	Professional appearance and attitude
	Good organizational abilities
	Attention to detail and problem-solving skills
	Time management and reliability.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using “FRONT DESK OFFICER” as the subject of the email.

  "description": "LEAM Consulting Limited - Our client, a Travels &amp; Tour Company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand / Social Media Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ososami, Ringroad, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Brand / Social Media Strategist develops and execute long-term content strategies, manage campaigns, analyze audience trends, and monitor KPIs to align social media efforts with broader marketing goals


Responsibilities


	Strategy Development: Design comprehensive social media strategies to achieve brand awareness and marketing targets.
	Content &amp; Campaign Management: Create, plan, and execute high-quality content calendars and campaigns across platforms like LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook.
	Conduct market research, competitor benchmarking (SWOT analysis), and analyze behavior to identify opportunities.
	Manage relationships with external clients &amp; partnership deals
	Stay up-to-date with digital marketing trends and best practices.


Requirements/ Qualifications


	B.Sc in Marketing,Communication or any related field of study
	2 - 3 years of experience as Digital marketer or social media strategist
	Strong understanding on social media trends or Client relationship management
	Ability to create innovative content to drive business goals daily with creative thinking and problem solving ability
	Self motivated with a passion for learning and development.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;hiring@leamconsulting.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of email.

Note:&nbsp;It&#39;s a full time on-site role.",

Brand / Social Media Specialist Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited - Our client, a Travels & Tour Company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Brand / Social Media Specialist

Job Location: Ososami, Ringroad, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Brand / Social Media Strategist develops and execute long-term content strategies, manage campaigns, analyze audience trends, and monitor KPIs to align social media efforts with broader marketing goals


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Strategy Development: Design comprehensive social media strategies to achieve brand awareness and marketing targets.
	Content & Campaign Management: Create, plan, and execute high-quality content calendars and campaigns across platforms like LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook.
	Conduct market research, competitor benchmarking (SWOT analysis), and analyze behavior to identify opportunities.
	Manage relationships with external clients & partnership deals
	Stay up-to-date with digital marketing trends and best practices.


Requirements/ Qualifications


	B.Sc in Marketing,Communication or any related field of study
	2 - 3 years of experience as Digital marketer or social media strategist
	Strong understanding on social media trends or Client relationship management
	Ability to create innovative content to drive business goals daily with creative thinking and problem solving ability
	Self motivated with a passion for learning and development.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of email.

Note: It's a full time on-site role.    

    

        Click here to Apply
